mapper.select:
select
distinct
from countrylanguage
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.delete: delete from countrylanguage
mapper.insert: insert into countrylanguage (CountryCode, Language, IsOfficial, Percentage) values (#{countryCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{language,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{isOfficial,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{percentage,jdbcType=DECIMAL})

insert into countrylanguage
CountryCode,
Language,
IsOfficial,
Percentage,
#{countryCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{language,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{isOfficial,jdbcType=CHAR},
#{percentage,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
mapper.select: select count(*) from countrylanguage
mapper.update:
update countrylanguage
CountryCode = #{row.countryCode,jdbcType=CHAR},
Language = #{row.language,jdbcType=CHAR},
IsOfficial = #{row.isOfficial,jdbcType=CHAR},
Percentage = #{row.percentage,jdbcType=DECIMAL},

update countrylanguage set CountryCode = #{row.countryCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, Language = #{row.language,jdbcType=CHAR}, IsOfficial = #{row.isOfficial,jdbcType=CHAR}, Percentage = #{row.percentage,jdbcType=DECIMAL}
